series_metadata.series_title: Periodic Statutory Life & Health Insurance Certificates
series_metadata.series_description: Periodic documentation required by insurers to demonstrate compliance with regulatory requirements relative to certain activities and practices for specified life and health insurance products. Authority: various sections of ORC 3923, 3924, 1751, and OAC 3901-1.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: hard copy imaged ; Electronic: hard copy imaged
